meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: Gulf, Arab nations react to Iran-US ceasefire announcement
items.summary: Countries in the region welcome the temporary truce and urge negotiations for the war's permanent end.

items.title: Romanian football great Mircea Lucescu dies aged 80
items.summary: Lucescu, one of the most successful Romanian football coaches and players, won several European club titles.

items.title: Tehran celebrates as Iran, US agree to two-week ceasefire
items.summary: Iran hails the pause in hostilities as a 'victory', crediting national unity and patience for the agreement.

items.title: ‘Our geography is our oil’: Why Djibouti hosts many foreign military bases
items.summary: Just miles from one another, along Djibouti's coast, sit military bases of rival powers including the US and China.

items.title: On rare China visit, Taiwan’s opposition leader calls for reconciliation
items.summary: KMT chief Cheng Li-wun, the party's first leader to visit China in a decade, hopes to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping.

items.title: Yemen’s teachers pushed to the brink as salaries collapse
items.summary: Yemeni teachers juggle multiple jobs and endure hunger as protests grow over meager and delayed salaries.

items.title: US-Israeli war on Iran: What is happening on day 40?
items.summary: The US and Iran agree to a two-week truce, just an hour before Trump’s deadline to escalate the conflict expired.

items.title: Iran war live: Trump declares ceasefire, Tehran agrees safe Hormuz transit
items.summary: Iran has claimed victory and says upcoming talks in Pakistan do not mean the end of war is guaranteed.

items.title: ‘Fearless’ teen sensation Sooryavanshi aces Bumrah test in IPL blitz
items.summary: The 15-year-old opener hit 39 off 14 balls as Rajasthan Royals put on 150-3 in 11 overs against Mumbai Indians.

items.title: In Strait of Hormuz, Iran and China take aim at US dollar hegemony
items.summary: Tehran and Beijing both stand to gain from boosting status of the Chinese yuan.

items.title: US ceasefire allows negotiations on Iran’s ‘workable’ 10-point plan
items.summary: Donald Trump’s announcement of a two-week ceasefire paves the way for negotiations on Iran's 10-point plan.

items.title: US politicians react to Trump’s Iran ceasefire with caution, relief
items.summary: Republican hawks voice scepticism about talks with Tehran as Democrats welcome the truce and call for accountability.

items.title: Iranians commemorate victims of Minab school strike
items.summary: Iranians have commemorated the victims of the US strike on a girls school in Minab, that killed 168 people.

items.title: World welcomes US-Iran ceasefire, urges lasting peace in the Middle East
items.summary: Countries urge full commitment to two-week ceasefire, praise Pakistan for role in facilitating truce.

items.title: Netanyahu says US-Iran ceasefire ‘does not include Lebanon’
items.summary: Israeli prime minister welcomes US decision to suspend attacks on Iran, but says the truce does not apply to Lebanon.

items.title: Is Arteta’s intensity Arsenal’s Premier and Champions League hope, or fear?
items.summary: Arsenal squeeze 1-0 win at Sporting Lisbon to end winless run, but is pressure telling after another below-par outing?

items.title: Iraqis celebrates US-Iran ceasefire as two-week halt in war begins
items.summary: Celebrations have erupted in Iraq following the announcement of a two-week ceasefire between Iran and the US.

items.title: Climate activist Greta Thunberg slams Trump’s threats against Iran
items.summary: Polls have found that young people in the United States are more sceptical of foreign intervention and war on Iran.

items.title: Trump administration reaffirms plans to deport Abrego Garcia to Liberia
items.summary: Abrego Garcia's wrongful removal in 2025 has spurred criticism of the Trump administration's mass deportation campaign.

items.title: Oil prices slide, stocks surge as Trump announces two-week Iran ceasefire
items.summary: Investors welcome the possible resumption of oil and gas flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Iran says talks with US will begin in Pakistan’s Islamabad on Friday
items.summary: Tehran says the negotiations will be based on its 10-point proposal, which calls for control over Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Iran agrees to open Strait of Hormuz for two-week US ceasefire
items.summary: Iran’s Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says ‘if attacks against Iran are halted,’ then Iran agrees to a US ceasefire.

items.title: White House confirms two-week suspension of strikes on Iran
items.summary: The White House has confirmed the US has agreed to suspend all bombing and military attacks on Iran for two weeks.

items.title: Trump agrees to pause attacks on Iran if Strait of Hormuz opens
items.summary: US President Donald Trump says he has agreed to extend his threatened deadline to attack Iran by two weeks.

items.title: Billionaire investor Ackman makes $64bn bid for Universal Music Group
items.summary: Universal Music, the label behind superstars Taylor Swift and Bad Bunny, is expected to list in NY from Amsterdam.
